song_name: Maroon 5 - Memories - Maroon 5 - Girls Like You - Lewis Capaldi - Someone You Love
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]

[ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]


[Verse 1 - Maroon 5]

[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]Am[/ch]                   [ch]Em[/ch]
There's a time that I remember, when I did not know no pain[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]F[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]
When I believed in forever, and everything would stay the same[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]
Now my heart feel like December when somebody say your name[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
Cause I can't reach out to call you, but I know I will one day, yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
Everybody hurts sometimes[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                  [ch]Em[/ch]
Everybody hurts someday, ayy ayy[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]
But everything gon' be alright[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]
Go and raise a glass and say, ayy[/tab]


[Chorus - Maroon 5]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]G[/ch]
Here's to the ones that we got[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                          [ch]Em[/ch]
Cheers to the wish you were here, but you're not[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch]
'Cause the drinks bring back all the memories[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]F[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]
Of everything we've been through[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]                              [ch]G[/ch]
('Cause girls like you run 'round with guys like me)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                        [ch]Em[/ch]
Toast to the ones that we lost on the way[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                            [ch]C[/ch]
Girls like you love fun and, yeah, me too[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]F[/ch]
What I want when I come through[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]
I need a girl like you, yeah yeah[/tab]


[Verse 2 - Maroon 5]

[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]
I spent last night on the last flight to you[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]                    [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]
Took a whole day up trying to get way up, ooh[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]
We spent the daylight trying to make things right between us[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]
But now it's all good, babe[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]
Roll that back wood, babe[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
And play me close, yeah[/tab]


[Chorus - Maroon 5]

[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]                              [ch]G[/ch]
'Cause girls like you run 'round with guys like me[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Am[/ch]
'Til sun down when I come through[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]                        [ch]F[/ch]
I need a girl like you, yeah yeah[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]C[/ch]
And then you pulled the rug[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]F[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]
I was getting kinda used to being someone you loved[/tab]


[Verse 3 - Lewis Capaldi]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]                             [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]
I'm going under and this time I fear there's no one to turn to[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                          [ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
This all or nothing way of loving got me sleeping without you[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]C[/ch]
I need somebody to know[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]
Somebody to heal[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Am[/ch]
Somebody to have[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Em[/ch]
Just to know how it feels[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]F[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]
It's easy to say but it's never the same[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]F[/ch]                             [ch]G[/ch]
I guess I kinda liked the way you helped me escape[/tab]


[Chorus - Lewis Capaldi]

[tab]                       [ch]C[/ch]
And, now the day bleeds[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]G[/ch]
Into nightfall[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Am[/ch]
And you're not here[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]Em[/ch]
To get me through it all[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]F[/ch]

[tab]                           [ch]C[/ch]

[tab]                   [ch]F[/ch]                          [ch]G[/ch]
I was getting kinda used to being someone you loved[/tab]


[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]

[tab]                   [ch]Am[/ch]                         [ch]Em[/ch]
I was getting kinda used to being someone you loved[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]
Yeah yeah yeah, yeah yeah yeah[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]F[/ch]                          [ch]G[/ch]
I was getting kinda used to being someone you loved[/tab]

[ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] 
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]
(When I believed in a girl like you)[/tab]
[ch]C[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]


[Bridge - Maroon 5 / Cardi B]

[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]
There's a time that I remember when I never felt so lost[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]F[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
When I felt all of the hatred was too powerful to stop[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]Em[/ch]
Now my heart feel like an ember and it's lighting up the dark[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
I'll carry these torches for ya that you know I'll never drop, yeah[/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Not too long ago, I was dancing for dollars[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Know it's really real if I let you meet my mama[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
You don't want a girl like me I'm too crazy[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Em[/ch]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]

[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]

[tab]   [ch]Am[/ch]                   N.C.

[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]
I don't play when it comes to my heart (let's get it though)[/tab]

[tab] [ch]F[/ch]
I need you right here 'cause every time you call[/tab]
